mapper.select:
SELECT tn.*, u.name AS userName, d.drink_name, d.category_code AS categoryCode, cc.code_name AS typeName FROM tasting_note tn
LEFT JOIN user u ON tn.user_id = u.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN drink d ON tn.drink_id = d.drink_id AND d.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON d.type_code = cc.code AND cc.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE tn.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY tn.created_at DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT tn.*, u.name AS userName, IFNULL(l.likeCount, 0) AS likeCount
FROM tasting_note tn
JOIN user u ON tn.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id, COUNT(*) AS likeCount FROM `like` WHERE obj_type = 'NOTE' GROUP BY obj_id ) l ON l.obj_id = tn.note_id WHERE tn.drink_id = #{drinkId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY tn.rating DESC, tn.created_at DESC
ORDER BY tn.rating ASC, tn.created_at DESC
ORDER BY tn.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasting_note tn WHERE tn.drink_id = #{drinkId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT tn.*, u.name AS userName, d.drink_name, d.category_code AS categoryCode, cc.code_name AS typeName, IFNULL(l.likeCount, 0) AS likeCount FROM tasting_note tn
LEFT JOIN user u ON tn.user_id = u.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN drink d ON tn.drink_id = d.drink_id AND d.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON d.type_code = cc.code AND cc.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id, COUNT(*) AS likeCount FROM `like` WHERE obj_type = 'NOTE' GROUP BY obj_id ) l ON l.obj_id = tn.note_id
WHERE tn.note_id = #{noteId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasting_note ( user_id, drink_id, title, content, rating, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{drinkId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{rating}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tasting_note SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, rating = #{rating}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE tasting_note SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tasting_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
